snowsense 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Snow Detection and Fractional Snow Cover with snowsense

Example Sentinel-2 RGB+SWIR raster (20 m)

example_s2_20m.Rd

A small Sentinel-2 GeoTIFF included with the snowsense package for demonstrations and testing. The raster contains 13 bands:

Band 1 (B01)

Coastal Aerosol

Band 2 (B02)

Blue

Band 3 (B03)

Green

Band 4 (B04)

Red

Band 5 (B05)

Red Edge 1

Band 6 (B06)

Red Edge 2

Band 7 (B07)

Red Edge 3

Band 8 (B08)

NIR

Band 9 (B8A)

Narrow NIR

Band 10 (B09)

Water Vapour

Band 11 (B10)

Cirrus

Band 12 (B11)

SWIR 1

Band 13 (B12)

SWIR 2

Details

The raster is located at the Zugspitzplatt in UTM zone 32N (EPSG:32632).

The file can be accessed with:


system.file("extdata", "example_s2_20m.tif", package = "snowsense")

Developed by Lutz K.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
